zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Brounker於1510年1月1日出生在英國維爾爾梅爾可善姆時，他的父親Robert Brounker45歲，母親Unknown Gouldinge40歲。他於1539年與Lady Ursula Ann Yates在英國維爾爾梅爾可善姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1568年8月12日在英國維爾爾艾萊斯托可享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Brounker于1510年1月1日出生在英国維爾爾梅爾可善姆时，他的父亲Robert Brounker45岁，母亲Unknown Gouldinge40岁。他于1539年与Lady Ursula Ann Yates在英国維爾爾梅爾可善姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1568年8月12日在英国維爾爾艾萊斯托可享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brounker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (Rhineland-Palatinate; mainly Brünker): habitational name for someone from Brunken in Rhineland-Palatinate.

variants.name: Brunger
meanings: German (Brünger): from the ancient Germanic personal name Brunger meaning ‘brown or shining spear’.
English (Kent): from the Middle English personal name Brunger (Old English Brūngār, with the same etymology as its ancient Germanic cognate Brunger in 1 above).
Altered form of Swiss German Brüngger: habitational name denoting someone from Brünggen in Switzerland.

variants.name: Branker
meanings: English (Wiltshire and Kent; also common in the West Indies): perhaps a variant of   Brunker   (see   Brunger  ).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Brounker was born on 1 January 1510, in Melksham, Wiltshire, England, his father, Robert Brounker, was 45 and his mother, Unknown Gouldinge, was 40. He married Lady Ursula Ann Yates in 1539, in Melksham, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 12 August 1568, in Erlestoke, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Brounker est né le 1 janvier 1510, à Melksham, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Brounker, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Unknown Gouldinge, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Lady Ursula Ann Yates en 1539, à Melksham, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 août 1568, à Erlestoke, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Brounker am 1. Januar 1510 in Melksham, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Brounker 45 und seine Mutter Unknown Gouldinge 40. Er hat 1539 in Melksham, Wiltshire, England Lady Ursula Ann Yates geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. August 1568 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Erlestoke, Wiltshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Brounker è nato il il 1 gennaio 1510 nel Melksham, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Brounker, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Unknown Gouldinge, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Lady Ursula Ann Yates nel 1539, nel Melksham, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 agosto 1568, nel Erlestoke, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Brounkerが1510年1月1日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアメルクシャムで生まれた時，父Robert Brounkerは45歳，母Unknown Gouldingeは40歳であった。1539年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアメルクシャムでLady Ursula Ann Yatesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1568年8月12日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアエルレストクで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Brounker(이)가 1510년 1월 1일 영국 윌츠히르 멜크샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Brounker(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Unknown Gouldinge(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1539년 영국 윌츠히르 멜크샤에서 Lady Ursula Ann Yates(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1568년 8월 12일 영국 윌츠히르 를레스토크에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 January 1510–12 August 1568: 1 de janeiro de 1510–12 de agosto de 1568
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Brounker nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1510, em Melksham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Brounker, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Unknown Gouldinge, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Ursula Ann Yates em 1539, em Melksham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1568, em Erlestoke, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Brounker родился 1 января 1510 г. в местности мелкшам, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Brounker было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Unknown Gouldinge, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Ursula Ann Yates в 1539 г. в местности мелкшам, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 12 августа 1568 г. в местности эрльсток, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.1 January 1510–12 August 1568: 1 de enero de 1510–12 de agosto de 1568
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Brounker nació el 1 de enero de 1510, en Melksham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Brounker, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Unknown Gouldinge, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Lady Ursula Ann Yates en 1539, en Melksham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de agosto de 1568, en Erlestoke, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
